evals.prompt: Build a browser-based endless runner with obstacle spawning, score tracking, and keyboard controls.
evals.expected_output: Routes to website-building/game because the request is explicitly for a browser game with gameplay mechanics and controls.

evals.prompt: Build a SaaS admin dashboard with login, usage charts, billing pages, and a settings workflow.
evals.expected_output: Routes to website-building/webapp because the request needs app-style workflows, dashboards, and backend-friendly patterns.

evals.prompt: Create a polished landing page for an architecture studio with case studies, an about section, and contact CTA.
evals.expected_output: Routes to website-building/informational because the request is content-first brand presentation without app or game behavior.
